mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_legal_law WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN urgent = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, enforce_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_legal_law WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_law WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_law WHERE deleted = 0 AND review_status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_law WHERE deleted = 0 AND apply_yn = #{apply}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_law WHERE deleted = 0 AND urgent = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_law ( category, law_name, clause, amend_type, promulgate_date, enforce_date, reviewer, review_due_date, review_status, apply_yn, follow_up_action, amend_summary, urgent, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{lawName}, #{clause}, #{amendType}, #{promulgateDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enforceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reviewer}, #{reviewDueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reviewStatus}, #{applyYn}, #{followUpAction}, #{amendSummary}, #{urgent}0, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_law SET category = #{category}, law_name = #{lawName}, clause = #{clause}, amend_type = #{amendType}, promulgate_date = #{promulgateDate,jdbcType=DATE}, enforce_date = #{enforceDate,jdbcType=DATE}, reviewer = #{reviewer}, review_due_date = #{reviewDueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, apply_yn = #{applyYn}, follow_up_action = #{followUpAction}, amend_summary = #{amendSummary}, urgent = #{urgent}0, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_legal_law SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
